text:
A small handful of mint leaves, shredded

Cut the cucumbers in half lengthways and scoop out the seeds with a teaspoon. Cut each half on an angle into 1-2cm thick slices.

Heat a ridged griddle pan or heavy-based fryingpan over a medium-high heat. Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper, brush with oil and cook for about 5 minutes on each side, keeping them pink.

Meanwhile, heat the rapeseed oil in another frying pan and add the shallots.fry,stirring, for a minute, then add the cucumber slices. Season with salt
And pepper and saute over a fairly high heat for 2-3 minutes until tender. Take off the heat and stir in the shredded mint.

Divide the cucumber between warmed plates and place the lamb chops on top to serve


Lamb's sweetbreads with runner beans. Bacon and mushrooms
Serves 4
300-400g lamb's sweetbreads
